title: T-053 — Complaint intake API + NCR link Server Action (V-QA-COMPLAINT-001/002)
prompt:
# T-053 — Complaint intake API + NCR link

PRD: §11.6 V-QA-COMPLAINT-001/002, §7.1 09-e-04, §12.1 outbox channel

## Goal
3 complaint Server Actions: receiveComplaint, escalateToNcr, resolveComplaint. Enforces V-QA-COMPLAINT-001 (received_at <= NOW()) and V-QA-COMPLAINT-002 (critical severity requires response_due_at <= received + 2 business days). Emits quality.complaint.* outbox.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/src/server/quality/complaint/actions.ts — 3 Server Actions.
2. receiveComplaint: V-QA-COMPLAINT-001 server check (reject future timestamps); V-QA-COMPLAINT-002 critical severity must come with response_due_at within 2 business days (business-day compute server-side); inserts row with status='received'.
3. escalateToNcr: creates an NCR draft via T-038 createNcrDraft with ncr_type='complaint_related' reference_type='complaint' reference_id=complaint.id; sets linked_ncr_id on the complaint; emits quality.complaint.escalated.
4. resolveComplaint: status→'resolved', resolved_by + resolved_at = server clock, audit-logged; emits quality.complaint.resolved.
5. Permissions reserved (packages/rbac): quality.complaint.create, quality.complaint.read, quality.complaint.escalate, quality.complaint.resolve, quality.complaint.export.

## Files
- apps/web/src/server/quality/complaint/actions.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/complaint/__tests__/actions.test.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/complaint/zodSchemas.ts [create]
- packages/rbac/src/permissions.enum.ts [modify]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given receiveComplaint with received_at=NOW()+1day (future), when called, then 422 error.code='V-QA-COMPLAINT-001'
2. Given receiveComplaint with severity='critical' AND response_due_at=received+3 business days, when called, then 422 error.code='V-QA-COMPLAINT-002'; with response_due_at=received+1 business day, then it succeeds and emits quality.complaint.created
3. Given escalateToNcr(complaintId), when called, then a new ncr_reports row is created via T-038 with ncr_type='complaint_related' reference_id=complaintId, complaints.linked_ncr_id is set, and quality.complaint.escalated outbox event is emitted
4. Given resolveComplaint(id, {resolutionNotes}), when called, then status='resolved', resolved_by = session.userId, resolved_at = server NOW(), audit log row exists, and quality.complaint.resolved event emits

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: complaint/__tests__/actions.test.ts asserting all 4 ACs before code
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test complaint/actions'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow future received_at (V-QA-COMPLAINT-001 is server-only)
- Do not skip business-day compute (V-QA-COMPLAINT-002 uses business days, not calendar days)
- Do not bypass T-038 createNcrDraft for escalation (single audit/outbox path)
- Do not skip permissions enum registration

pipeline_inputs.description: 3 complaint Server Actions (receive/escalate/resolve) enforcing V-QA-COMPLAINT-001/002 + emitting quality.complaint.* outbox + permissions enum reservation.
pipeline_inputs.details: receiveComplaint enforces V-QA-COMPLAINT-001 (received_at <= NOW()) + V-QA-COMPLAINT-002 (critical severity: response_due_at <= received + 2 business days; uses bizDay compute helper). escalateToNcr invokes T-038 createNcrDraft with ncr_type='complaint_related' reference_type='complaint' reference_id=complaint.id; sets linked_ncr_id. resolveComplaint sets status='resolved' + resolved_by + resolved_at via server clock. All 3 emit quality.complaint.* outbox events. Permissions reserved: quality.complaint.create/read/escalate/resolve/export.
out_of_scope: Do not implement full complaint RCA/CAPA workflow (P2 EPIC 8M)
Do not build complaint UI (deferred to QA-052 stub form — out of this batch)
Do not implement complaint_categories reference table

Given resolveComplaint, when called, then status='resolved', resolved_by=session.userId, resolved_at=server NOW(), audit log row exists, quality.complaint.resolved emits
